channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vuyelwa Maluleke explores identity, memory and queer life in township-set ‘The Blue Album’
item.description: Vuyelwa Maluleke’s one-woman theatre production, The Blue Album, is a deeply reflective work that interrogates identity, language and belonging within the South African township context. An award-nomi...

item.title: Trial Examines Cause of Mississauga Bus Crash That Killed One Person
item.description: The trial of Mississauga transit bus driver Baljeet Dhaliwal continued with closing arguments in Brampton, Ontario, over a fatal crash that occurred on June 8, 2023. The collision involved a MiWay bus...

item.title: Gene therapy helps restore vision in six-year-old girl with rare genetic condition
item.description: A six-year-old girl with a rare inherited eye disorder has experienced a significant improvement in her vision after receiving an experimental gene therapy, according to her parents and medical team. ...

item.title: Vice Ganda features Francine Diaz wearing a jersey-made bag on It’s Showtime
item.description: On the popular Filipino noontime show 'It’s Showtime,' comedian and host Vice Ganda highlighted a unique fashion piece by having actress Francine Diaz showcase a bag made entirely from jersey material...

item.title: Tinubu Approves Minor Cabinet Reshuffle, Replaces Finance Minister Wale Edun with Taiwo Oyedele and Housing Minister Ahmed Dangiwa with Muttaqha Rabe Darma
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don approve one small cabinet reshuffle wey affect two key ministries for Nigeria. Him sack Wale Edun as Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy after almost...

item.title: Tana Delta Restoration: The Role of Beekeeping and Community Investments in Kenya's Environmental Revival
item.description: The Tana Delta in Kenya has been undergoing a transformative restoration process, thanks to innovative funding models and community-based efforts. At the heart of the project is a shift from large-sca...

item.title: Kruger’s Lower Sabie camp affected by shop fire, visitors advised to bring supplies
item.description: South African National Parks (SANParks) has advised visitors heading to the Lower Sabie rest camp in the Kruger National Park to arrive well-prepared with essential supplies following a fire that dama...

item.title: Mars Rover Detects Organic Molecules, Suggesting Ancient Life May Have Existed
item.description: NASA's Mars rover has detected organic molecules in rock samples collected on the Martian surface, offering significant clues about the planet's potential to have supported ancient life. These molecul...

item.title: Political Antics in South Africa Offer Unintended Humour Amid National Challenges
item.description: Life in South Africa remains challenging, particularly with rising living costs and anticipated fuel price hikes. While citizens seek relief in entertainment, the political scene often provides uninte...

item.title: Siaya Student Struggles to Continue Education After Financial Setbacks in Medical and Nursing Schools
item.description: Mary Grace Otieno, a determined young woman from Bondo, Siaya County, has faced numerous financial challenges in her journey to becoming a healthcare professional. After completing her Kenya Certifica...

item.title: Ramaphosa to Speak at Global Inequality Dialogue in Johannesburg
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa will deliver a keynote address at the Global Inequality Dialogue at the University of the Witwatersrand in Johannesburg on Friday, 24 April 2026. The event follows South Afri...

item.title: Fossil of 100-Million-Year-Old Snake Reveals Evolutionary Features
item.description: A fossil of the ancient snake species Najash rionegrina, discovered in Argentina, is providing significant insights into early snake evolution. Dating back nearly 100 million years, Najash had hind le...

item.title: U.S. Soldier Charged Over Alleged Insider Betting on Venezuela Operation Outcome
item.description: U.S. authorities have arrested and charged a special forces soldier, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, for allegedly using classified information to profit from prediction market bets tied to a military operation ...

item.title: Severe weather warnings issued across Manitoba: Blizzard, freezing rain, and thunderstorms
item.description: Manitoba is experiencing a series of severe weather conditions, including blizzards, freezing rain, and thunderstorms. Northern and central regions are under blizzard warnings, with gusty winds and sn...

item.title: Over 250 Indians With Claims of Biblical Ancestry Arrive in Israel for Settlement
item.description: A group of over 250 Indian nationals, asserting that they are descendants of an ancient Biblical tribe, have recently arrived in Israel. These individuals have reportedly undergone processes that conf...

item.title: Lawmakers Question Pentagon Contract Awarded to Eric Trump's Company
item.description: Democratic lawmakers have strongly criticized the Pentagon for awarding a $24 million contract to Foundation Future Industries, a robotics startup linked to Eric Trump, son of President Donald Trump. ...

item.title: CUET PG 2026 Results Update: NTA Announces Scorecard and Cut-Off Details
item.description: The CUET PG 2026 examination results are expected to be released soon by the National Testing Agency (NTA). Candidates appearing for the exam will be able to check their results, download their scorec...

item.title: Governor Bala Mohammed Declares Independence from PDP, APC, After Talks with Peter Obi
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed, has distanced himself from both the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) and the All Progressives Congress (APC), describing himself as a 'freelance politician.' He mad...

item.title: Weekly Highlights from Moss & Fog: Art, Architecture, Nature, and Culture
item.description: This weekly edition of “Fog Signals” from Moss & Fog curates a selection of standout stories spanning art, architecture, science fiction, history, and nature. A key highlight is the introduction of “T...

item.title: Tshwane Metro Police Officer Testifies About R150,000 Loan from Security Contractor
item.description: Maj Lebogang Phiri, a suspended officer in the Tshwane Metro Police Department, testified at the Madlanga commission investigating corruption in law enforcement. Phiri admitted that in May 2025 he rec...
